title: scorzonera humilis var. plantaginea
intro: Scorzonera humilis var. plantaginea, also known as plantain scorzonera, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant contains sesquiterpene lactones, which have been shown to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Scorzonera humilis var. plantaginea can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
